features.name: Project Scaffold
features.description: Create or confirm the Bun + Next.js + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4 + shadcn/ui + SQLite + Vercel AI SDK scaffold.
features.evidence: Current repository only contains harness files. Run ./init.sh after package.json and source scaffold exist.

features.name: Design System Integration
features.description: Fill DESIGN.md during the first concrete UI task, then map finalized tokens into Tailwind CSS v4 theme variables and shadcn/ui styling conventions.
features.evidence: DESIGN.md is intentionally a placeholder for initial setup. Validate it after real tokens are added.

features.name: Core Product Feature
features.description: Implement the first concrete Muse user-facing workflow after requirements are provided.

features.name: Verification Coverage
features.description: Add or confirm type checks, linting, build checks, tests, and manual verification for the active feature.

features.name: Cleanup and Handoff
features.description: Record verification evidence, update progress.md and session-handoff.md, and leave a clear next-session path.
